economic_notes: Band holds 12.5% in Stuwix Resources Joint Venture, 100% in 0538053 BC Ltd (which holds 25% in Esh-kn-am Joint Venture and 25% in 9110 Investments Ltd), and 20% in Spayum Holdings LP. COVID-19 pandemic noted as potential future revenue impact. Band operates rental housing.
notes: Audit is qualified on two grounds: (1) Social Housing tangible capital assets amortized at rate equivalent to annual principal reduction of related CMHC long-term debt rather than over estimated useful lives per PSAS; (2) rents receivable of $219,715 not susceptible to satisfactory audit verification. No budget presented as Band does not prepare one. Accounts receivable includes both trade AR ($358,697) and rents receivable ($219,716) totalling $578,413. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,610,910) + ISETS ($8,161) + CMHC RRAP and Retrofit ($73,481) + CMHC Subsidy ($113,576) + Province of BC ($1,774,894) + FNESC ($30,996) + BC Hydro ($94,010) = approximately $3,706,028. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method include Stuwix Resources Joint Venture, 0538053 BC Ltd, and Spayum Holdings LP. Capital segment expense was $3,568. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2020 but audit report dated September 19, 2022 — significant delay.
